description: LACOFIA baby shoes were designed for babies from 0 to 18 months. great as babies' crib, crawl,first walking shoes. LACOFIA baby shoes material The Lacofia baby girls princess shoes made with premium cotton uppers to ensure all-day comfort, anti-slip soft sole supports balance for new walkers and promotes healthy foot growth. LACOFIA baby shoes design Elastic closure make these shoes easy to put on and they keep the shoes securely on your child's feet. The cute baby shoes also feature a big bowknot design, good match a baby girl's outfit for a party, wedding, birthday, baptism, photography, daily use etc. LACOFIA baby shoes Size Guide For a growing baby, making sure get the right shoes size is important. please choose our size guide carefully: Size/Age Group Heel to toe Length 0-3 Months 10cm/3.94 inches 3-6 Months 11cm/4.33 inches 6-12 Months 12cm/4.72 inches 12-18 Months 13cm/5.12 inches
